channel.title: Posts on Lapor Chen
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Lapor Chen

item.title: DcBot
item.description: Making a discord bot cus I’m kinda boring and want to do something about coding. I also want to make something actually useful in life. But I have no idea what to do. Maybe make the bot actually do something useful? Now it just doing stupid reactions.
item.content:
Making a discord bot cus I’m kinda boring and want to do something about coding.
I also want to make something actually useful in life.
But I have no idea what to do.
Maybe make the bot actually do something useful?
Now it just doing stupid reactions.

item.title: EditTheme
item.description: Changing the color of the Theme. I don’t want to have a blog looks like my friend’s one. So I changed it to purple :)
item.content:
Changing the color of the Theme.
I don’t want to have a blog looks like my friend’s one.
So I changed it to purple :)

item.title: Shortcode
item.description: Learned to use shortcode today. Useful thing. Got my spotify playlists into this with shortcode :)
item.content: Learned to use shortcode today. Useful thing. Got my spotify playlists into this with shortcode :)

item.title: On Mac
item.description: Got my Macbook air today. Now learning macOS. Also using this post to test my git configuration. :)
item.content: Got my Macbook air today. Now learning macOS. Also using this post to test my git configuration. :)

item.title: Boring
item.description: Feel so boring in this pandemic quarantine. Working with competitive programming in the summer vaction. It’s really hard. And I got bamboozled by Windows. Newline in Windows would make a ‘\r’ in the end in the input buffer while Linux only put a ‘\n’ in the end. This gave me a lot of problems while I’m testing code with file input. Pain.
item.content:
Feel so boring in this pandemic quarantine.

Working with competitive programming in the summer vaction. It’s really hard. And I got bamboozled by Windows.

Newline in Windows would make a ‘\r’ in the end in the input buffer while Linux only put a ‘\n’ in the end. This gave me a lot of problems while I’m testing code with file input.

Pain.

item.title: Web Built
item.description: Finally got this thing down. Still don’t know how to use git properly.
item.content: Finally got this thing down. Still don’t know how to use git properly.

item.title: Nothing Wrong Here
item.content: Never gonna give you up
